title: GSocket Backdoor Delivered Through Bash Script, (Fri, Mar 20th)

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — GSocket Backdoor Delivered Through Bash Script, (Fri, Mar 20
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/23
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*isc.sans.edu*'
            - '*www.gsocket.io*'
            - '*zone-xsec.com*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_GSocket_Backdoor_Delivered_Through_Bash_ {
    meta:
        description = "GSocket Backdoor Delivered Through Bash Script, (Fri, Mar 20"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "6ce69f0a0db6c5e1479d2b05fb361846957f5ad8170f5e43c7d66928a43f3286" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "d94f75a70b5cabaf786ac57177ed841732e62bdcc9a29e06e5b41d9be567bcfa" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
